baseline_sources: ui-exploration.md (layout intent, sections, pattern tag dashboard)

traceability_notes: Surface identity and Stitch pointers are taken verbatim from design_package.json (mvp-primary-dashboard, project 3675777318594458616, screen 11611814ea7a4a2881d76c0c95fd3066).
Layout sections and component intent (header, nav, task list/cards, filters, primary CTA, status) are mapped from ui-exploration.md §1 (Active layout).

No computed color, shadow, or type-size export from Stitch exists in the artifact chain for attempt 1; color and elevation tables use provisional hex/shadow values aligned to the internal tooling / Smart Task Manager narrative in architecture-brief.json until stitch.approved_baseline is true or a visual token capture is appended.
Spacing and radii are normalized to the 8px grid per design_system_enforcement.skill.md (allowed steps 0,4,8,12,16,24,32,40,48,64).

token_table.name: bg-app
token_table.intent: Application canvas and main panels behind content.
token_table.usage_constraints: Page/root backgrounds; avoid for text containers smaller than AA contrast vs fg-default.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Inferred dashboard dark shell consistent with tooling narrative; verify against Stitch Dashboard when baseline approved.

token_table.name: bg-elevated
token_table.intent: Cards, side panels, modals above app canvas.
token_table.usage_constraints: Surfaces that stack above bg-app; pair with border-subtle or shadow-sm.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Normalized from typical dashboard card layer; not sampled from Stitch file in this cycle.

token_table.name: bg-subtle
token_table.intent: Inset rows, table stripes, chip backgrounds.
token_table.usage_constraints: Secondary fill only; not for primary text on low-contrast art.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Supports task list / chip pattern from ui-exploration key components.

token_table.name: fg-default
token_table.intent: Primary body and titles on dark surfaces.
token_table.usage_constraints: Default readable text on bg-app and bg-elevated (target AA text).
token_table.baseline_mapping: Provisional tooling neutrals pending Stitch chroma confirmation.

token_table.name: fg-muted
token_table.usage_constraints: Non-primary copy; not for critical warnings.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Supports filters/summary secondary copy per dashboard pattern.

token_table.name: accent-primary
token_table.intent: Primary actions (New task), links, focus accents.
token_table.usage_constraints: Interactive emphasis only; maintain focus ring token ring-focus.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Maps to primary CTA called out in ui-exploration.md key components.

token_table.name: accent-primary-hover
token_table.usage_constraints: Use only as hover layer for accent-primary surfaces.
token_table.baseline_mapping: State token; Stitch hover not captured—engineering to validate in ui_spec.

token_table.name: border-subtle
token_table.usage_constraints: 1px hairlines; combine with radius-md on cards.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Normalized divider for header/sidebar/main regions per layout sections.

token_table.name: semantic-success
token_table.usage_constraints: Status chips and success toasts; meet non-text contrast on dark bg where used as fill.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Maps to status indicators mentioned in ui-exploration key components.

token_table.name: semantic-warning
token_table.usage_constraints: Due soon / blocked soft warnings.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Provisional semantic for task tooling; confirm in critique cycle.

token_table.name: semantic-error
token_table.usage_constraints: Errors and destructive buttons; pair with fg-default on buttons for label contrast.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Architecture-brief requires semantic tokens for acceptance downstream.

token_table.name: space-0
token_table.usage_constraints: Collapsing stacks only.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Grid origin per 8px system.

token_table.name: space-1
token_table.usage_constraints: Icon-text pairs in chips and list meta.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Allowed auxiliary step per enforcement skill.

token_table.name: space-2
token_table.usage_constraints: Minimum stack gap inside dense molecules.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Base grid unit.

token_table.name: space-3
token_table.intent: Default inline padding for sm controls.
token_table.usage_constraints: Button sm horizontal padding, chip padding.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Normalized from enforcement internal padding sm.

token_table.name: space-4
token_table.intent: Standard inset for cards and inputs.
token_table.usage_constraints: Card body padding md; mobile layout gutter default.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Matches enforcement gutter mobile 16.

token_table.name: space-5
token_table.usage_constraints: Tablet gutter; vertical separation between dashboard regions.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Maps to enforcement tablet gutter 24.

token_table.name: space-6
token_table.intent: Large separation between major layout columns.
token_table.usage_constraints: Desktop outer gutters; sidebar to content gap.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Maps to enforcement desktop gutter 32.

token_table.name: space-7
token_table.usage_constraints: Top of main column below header band.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Dashboard header-to-content separation (normalized).

token_table.name: space-8
token_table.intent: Maximum standard stack gap before breaking layout.
token_table.usage_constraints: Rare; use for empty states vertical centering aids.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Allowed enforcement upper step below 64.

token_table.name: space-9
token_table.usage_constraints: Page section wrappers only.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Upper bound per enforcement unless brief exception.

token_table.name: radius-sm
token_table.usage_constraints: Height-aligned to sm buttons.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Derived from 8px grid as sub-multiple for controls (documented exception to pure multiples for affordance).

token_table.name: radius-md
token_table.usage_constraints: Default card radius for task cards.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Maps to task list / cards in ui-exploration.

token_table.name: radius-lg
token_table.usage_constraints: Larger surfaces only.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Optional supporting panels per dashboard sections.

token_table.name: radius-pill
token_table.usage_constraints: Chips and rounded tabs only.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Filters/chips called out in ui-exploration key components.

token_table.name: shadow-none
token_table.usage_constraints: Prefer borders on dark theme unless elevation is required.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Minimal elevation set per architecture minimal shadows.

token_table.name: shadow-sm
token_table.usage_constraints: Floating elements above bg-elevated.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Provisional; Stitch shadow not captured.

token_table.name: shadow-focus-ring
token_table.usage_constraints: Keyboard focus only; do not replace text contrast.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Ties to accent-primary for accessible focus policy.

token_table.name: type-display
token_table.usage_constraints: Max one instance per viewport on dashboard.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Optional app header title; limit distinct sizes per enforcement (screen uses ≤4 sizes).

token_table.name: type-title
token_table.usage_constraints: AA text contrast tier on dark bg.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Primary headings in main task column / summary.

token_table.name: type-body
token_table.intent: Default reading text and list primary lines.
token_table.usage_constraints: Body copy; target 45–75 chars via layout width tokens, not smaller sizes.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Task titles and descriptions in list.

token_table.name: type-label
token_table.usage_constraints: AA text on dark surfaces when using fg-default or fg-muted as designed.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Filters, column headers for task grid.

token_table.name: type-caption
token_table.usage_constraints: Use fg-muted; AA large / non-critical copy only.
token_table.baseline_mapping: Secondary list meta (status line, due date).

font_families.sans: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
font_families.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

components.purpose: Top application bar with product context and global actions.

components.baseline_mapping: ui-exploration §1 sections: sidebar or secondary nav.

components.purpose: Primary dashboard workspace hosting lists and summaries.
components.baseline_mapping: ui-exploration §1 sections: main task list or grid; supporting panels.

components.purpose: Single task summary row or compact card in list.

accessibility.keyboard: row is focusable or contains focusable child buttons

components.baseline_mapping: ui-exploration key components: task list or cards; status indicators.

components.purpose: Primary call to action such as creating a new task.

accessibility.contrast: label on accent-primary must meet AA for text

components.baseline_mapping: ui-exploration key components: primary CTA (e.g. new task).

accessibility.text_alternative: label required; color not sole indicator where possible

migration_notes: Any ad-hoc hex or spacing in future Stitch exports must be rounded to the nearest allowed space token; document exceptions in ui_spec.json.
When stitch.approved_baseline becomes true, replace provisional color/shadow rows with measured values while keeping token names stable if possible.
